title: dcg-iye.4
description:
Verify and signoff 4 docs against actual code:
- docs/plans/03e-packs-other.md (not started) → internal/packs/frameworks/, internal/packs/remote/, internal/packs/secrets/, internal/packs/platform/
- docs/plans/03e-packs-other-test-harness.md (not started) → e2etest/
- docs/plans/03f-packs-personal-files.md (partial) → internal/packs/personal/
- docs/plans/03g-packs-macos.md (partial) → internal/packs/macos/

For each doc: read thoroughly, compare every type/function/test category against code, run tests, add Completion Signoff section (Complete or Partial with gaps). Report gaps via h2 send to dcg-scheduler. Commit updated docs.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Completed in commit 6f649d3. All 4 docs signed off with deviations documented.
